name: Kapston Facilities Management Limited
summary: Kapston Facilities Management Limited operates as an integrated facilities management company in India. The company offers security, housekeeping, engineering, office support, fa√É¬ßade cleaning, pest control, pantry, landscaping and gardening, canine brigade, and e-security services. It serves clients in various industries, such as IT and ITES, schools, hotels, hospitals, shopping malls, manufacturing companies, financial services establishments, infrastructure projects, and residential complexes. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
